messages.content: Can you please adapt the text of my cv on Mckinsey stile?
Certainly! However, please provide the text of your CV that you would like me to adapt in McKinsey style.

Experience

Passionate, committed, flexible and eclectic Head of Unit/IT Project Manager. Currently working full time in the fields of Portfolio Management. Passionate about new technologies, always curious and ready to learn. I am a certificated Prince2.
Always part of international organizations, I’ve developed the knowledge to manage local and remote teams, in complex environments, to work proactively and stay always focus on results. I developed management and organizational skills, ability to report and interface with C-level/ business, convinced that IT can lead and support business innovation.

Experience

Passionate, committed, flexible, and versatile Head of Unit/IT Project Manager with a strong McKinsey-style approach. Presently employed full-time specializing in Portfolio Management. Demonstrating a profound passion for new technologies, coupled with an unwavering curiosity and a proactive attitude towards continuous learning. Certified in Prince2, showcasing a commitment to adhering to industry best practices.

Throughout my career, I have consistently been a part of international organizations, thereby cultivating invaluable expertise in effectively managing both local and remote teams within complex environments. My adeptness in working proactively and maintaining unwavering focus on achieving results has been honed over the years. Moreover, I have acquired significant management and organizational skills, facilitating seamless reporting and fostering seamless communication with C-level executives and business stakeholders. I firmly believe that IT plays a pivotal role in spearheading and supporting business innovation.
con you pleas put it also captive for ATS

Experience

Passionate, committed, flexible, and versatile Head of Unit/IT Project Manager with a strong McKinsey-style approach. Presently employed full-time specializing in Portfolio Management. Demonstrating a profound passion for new technologies, coupled with an unwavering curiosity and a proactive attitude towards continuous learning. Certified in Prince2, showcasing a commitment to adhering to industry best practices.

Throughout my career, I have consistently been a part of international organizations, thereby cultivating invaluable expertise in effectively managing both local and remote teams within complex environments. Skilled in working proactively and staying focused on achieving results. Proficient in management and organizational skills, adept at producing reports and effectively interacting with C-level executives and business stakeholders. Firm belief in the pivotal role of IT in spearheading and supporting business innovation. 

Key Skills:
- Portfolio Management
- Team Management
- Remote Team Collaboration
- Proactive Approach
- Results-Oriented
- Effective Communication
- Prince2 Certification
- Business Innovation

ATS-optimized Version:
Passionate Head of Unit/IT Project Manager with a strong McKinsey-style approach. Experienced in Portfolio Management and dedicated to continuous learning. Certified in Prince2. Proven success managing local and remote teams within complex international organizations. Expertise in proactively achieving results and effectively communicating with C-level executives and stakeholders. A firm believer in the role of IT in driving business innovation. Key skills include Portfolio Management, Team Management, Remote Team Collaboration, Proactive Approach, Results-Oriented, Effective Communication, and Business Innovation.

Please note that this adaptation is intended to be ATS-friendly by using simplified language and bullet points. Also, ensure you tailor the content to align with the specific job you are applying for.
I do not work in Mckinsey the approach of the text should be nice for Mckinsey to read

Experience

Driven by passion, commitment, and adaptability, I have served as a versatile Head of Unit/IT Project Manager, dedicated to delivering exceptional results. Currently, I am fully immersed in the dynamic field of Portfolio Management. With an innate curiosity, I consistently embrace new technologies and actively seek out opportunities for personal and professional growth. I hold a prestigious certification in Prince2, which underlines my commitment to upholding industry best practices.

Throughout my career, I have consistently thrived within international organizations, honing my ability to effectively lead both local and remote teams in intricate and challenging environments. My proactive approach, accompanied by an unwavering focus on achieving tangible outcomes, has enabled me to successfully manage projects and exceed expectations. Alongside this, I have developed strong management and organizational competencies, enabling me to seamlessly report and liaise with C-level executives and stakeholders. I firmly believe that IT holds the power to drive and support business innovation, ensuring a harmonious integration between technology and overall strategic goals.

(Please note that although this adaptation is intended to be reader-friendly for McKinsey, it is crucial to customize the content to accurately reflect your own experiences and align with the specific job or organization you are targeting.)
keep it shorter

Passionate, committed Head of Unit/IT Project Manager with a focus on Portfolio Management. Proactive and results-oriented, I have successfully managed local and remote teams in complex international environments. Skilled in reporting and engaging with C-level executives, I believe in the power of IT to drive business innovation. Certified in Prince2.

(Please note that it is important to further tailor this summary to your specific experiences and qualifications when applying for a position at McKinsey to make it more effective.)

Alongside this, I have developed strong management and organizational competencies, enabling me to seamlessly report and liaise with C-level executives and stakeholders. Experience 

Passionate and results-oriented Head of Unit/IT Project Manager with a focus on Portfolio Management. Proven expertise in successfully leading local and remote teams within complex international environments. Certified in Prince2, demonstrating a commitment to industry best practices and delivering high-quality outcomes.

- Accomplished in embracing new technologies and continuously seeking personal and professional growth.
- Demonstrated ability to effectively manage projects and exceed expectations through proactive and focused approaches.
- Proficient in reporting and liaising with C-level executives and stakeholders, ensuring smooth communication and alignment.
- Strong management and organizational competencies developed through experience in international organizations.
- Firm belief in the transformative role of IT in driving business innovation and strategic goals.

(Please ensure to further tailor the content to meet specific ATS requirements and optimize the use of relevant keywords when applying for relevant positions.)
make it dryier

Experience 

Highly skilled and accomplished Head of Unit/IT Project Manager specializing in Portfolio Management. Demonstrating an unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional results, I possess a strong passion for driving organizational success. Certified in Prince2, I adhere to industry best practices to ensure optimal project outcomes.

Throughout my career, I have thrived within the complexity of international organizations, showcasing my ability to proficiently lead diverse teams in challenging environments. With a proactive and outcome-focused approach, I consistently achieve project objectives and surpass expectations. My robust management and organizational abilities streamline reporting processes and foster effective collaboration with C-level executives and stakeholders. Recognizing the pivotal role of IT in driving business innovation, I aim to align technology with strategic goals for sustainable growth.

(Applicants should further refine this content to comply with specific ATS requirements and incorporate industry-relevant keywords as necessary.)
can the following text be good for a MCkinsey recruiter?

Demonstrating an unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional results, I possess a strong passion for driving organizational success. The provided text can be suitable for a McKinsey recruiter. It highlights important aspects such as specialization in Portfolio Management and adherence to industry best practices. It also showcases leadership skills, a proactive approach, and the ability to achieve project objectives. Additionally, it emphasizes management and organizational abilities, effective collaboration with high-level executives, and a focus on aligning technology with strategic goals. However, it is always recommended to tailor the content further to align with the specific requirements and preferences of the recruiter.
can you adapt the text above as would apply for the following position Information Technology Program Project Manager

Experienced and accomplished Information Technology Program Project Manager specializing in portfolio management. Demonstrating an unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional results, I possess a strong passion for driving organizational success. Certified in Prince2, I adhere to industry best practices to ensure optimal project outcomes.

Throughout my career, I have excelled in managing complex IT programs within international organizations. With a proven track record of leading diverse teams in challenging environments, I consistently achieve project objectives and surpass expectations. My proactive and outcome-focused approach allows for seamless execution of programs, ensuring successful delivery on time and within budget. 

I possess strong management and organizational skills, streamlining reporting processes and fostering effective collaboration with stakeholders at all levels, including C-level executives. Recognizing the critical role of IT in driving business innovation, I am committed to aligning technology initiatives with strategic goals to achieve sustainable growth.

(Note: Please remember to further customize the content to align with the specific requirements and preferences of the Information Technology Program Project Manager position you are applying for.)
put the text captive for ATS

Experienced Information Technology Program Project Manager specializing in portfolio management. Demonstrated commitment to delivering exceptional results and driving organizational success. Certified in Prince2 and dedicated to adhering to industry best practices for optimal project outcomes.

Proficient in managing complex IT programs within international organizations. Track record of leading diverse teams in challenging environments to achieve project objectives with excellent results. Proactive and outcome-focused, ensuring timely and budget-friendly program execution.

Strong management and organizational skills, streamlining reporting processes and facilitating collaboration with stakeholders, including C-level executives. Recognizing the role of IT in driving business innovation, dedicated to aligning technology initiatives with strategic goals for sustainable growth.

(Note: Please ensure to further tailor the content and incorporate relevant keywords to maximize compatibility with the requirements and preferences of the ATS for the Information Technology Program Project Manager position you are applying for.)

CEDACRI S.p.A.
Head of Unit IT Portfolio Facility Management (On-Premises & Cloud) - Change and Delivery Department
October 2022 – Present
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy
Main activities: 
•	Facilitating collaboration across multiple functions 
•	Managing Infrastructural projects
•	Managing Bid process 
•	Acting as Cloud product manager for the Journey to cloud project
•	Analyzing financial data, including project budgets, risks, and resource allocation
•	Building relationships with vendors, clients (Banks, credit institutes) and company stakeholders

CEDACRI S.p.A.
Head of Unit IT Portfolio Facility Management (On-Premises & Cloud) - Change and Delivery Department
October 2022 – Present
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy

Key Responsibilities:
• Facilitating collaboration across multiple functions to ensure effective project delivery
• Managing infrastructural projects related to IT portfolio facility management
• Leading the bid process for projects and initiatives
• Serving as the Cloud product manager for the Journey to Cloud project
• Analyzing financial data, including project budgets, risks, and resource allocation
• Building and nurturing relationships with vendors, clients (Banks, credit institutes), and company stakeholders

Please note that this is an optimized version for ATS. Ensure to customize it further to meet specific ATS requirements or to include additional relevant information.

CEDACRI S.p.A.
Program Manager - Change and Delivery Department
March 2022 – October 2022 
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy
Responding to the Director I’ve been part of merge and acquisitions projects, defining the strategy for the legacy systems taking advantage on new technologies or archiving and decommissioning. 
•	Review vendor offers and quotes
•	Working along with HR and IT Team

CEDACRI S.p.A.
Program Manager - Change and Delivery Department
March 2022 – October 2022
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyzing and defining strategies for legacy systems during merge and acquisition projects, leveraging new technologies or implementing archiving and decommissioning processes
• Reviewing vendor offers and quotes to ensure the best value and fit for the organization
• Collaborating closely with HR and IT teams to support project objectives and ensure seamless execution

Note: Please remember to further customize the content to meet specific ATS requirements or include any other relevant information that may be helpful in showcasing your qualifications effectively.
Underline that my direct report was the director

Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy

• Collaborating closely with HR and IT teams to drive project success and seamless execution.
